summary: Azure Document Intelligence (prebuilt-layout) confirmed configured and connected. DPI normalization, block typing, and page dimension extraction all verified.

block_type_detection.kvp: Pattern: label-text: value (max 60 chars before colon)

page_dimensions.unit_in_response: pixel — already converted from DI inch coordinates
page_dimensions.purpose: Allows frontend canvas and PdfImportModal to scale field positions correctly

di_output_fields.pages: PageExtraction[] — OCR lines with bounding boxes and confidence scores
di_output_fields.mappings: FieldMapping[] — ranked ACORD label candidates per block
di_output_fields.pageDimensions: Array<{page, width, height, unit}> — pixel dimensions for canvas
di_output_fields.structuralDelta: Baseline delta object for first extraction (no prior document)
